pipelines.name: reid_{{CAMERA_NAME}}
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location=rtsp://mediaserver:8554/{{CAMERA_NAME}} latency=200 ! {{DECODE}} ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvapython class=PostDecodeTimestampCapture function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=timesync ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvadetect model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/person-detection-retail-0013/{{MODEL_PRECISION}}/person-detection-retail-0013.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/person-detection-retail-0013.json threshold={{DETECT_THRESHOLD}} inference-interval={{INFERENCE_INTERVAL}} {{DETECTION_OPTIONS}} device={{DETECT_DEVICE}} {{PRE_PROCESS}} {{PRE_PROCESS_CONFIG}} name=detection {{POST_DETECT}} ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvainference model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/clip-reid-market1501/{{CLIP_REID_PRECISION}}/clip-reid-market1501.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/clip-reid-market1501.json inference-region=roi-list object-class=person {{REID_OPTIONS}} device={{REID_DEVICE}} {{REID_PRE_PROCESS}} name=personreid ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvadetect model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/face-detection-retail-0004/{{FACE_DETECTION_PRECISION}}/face-detection-retail-0004.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/face-detection-retail-0004.json inference-region=roi-list object-class=person threshold=0.6 {{DETECTION_OPTIONS}} device={{DETECT_DEVICE}} {{FACE_PRE_PROCESS}} {{FACE_PRE_PROCESS_CONFIG}} name=facedetection {{POST_DETECT}} ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvainference model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/face-reidentification-retail-0095/{{MODEL_PRECISION}}/face-reidentification-retail-0095.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/face-reidentification-retail-0095.json inference-region=roi-list object-class=face {{REID_OPTIONS}} device={{REID_DEVICE}} {{REID_PRE_PROCESS}} name=facereid ! gvatrack tracking-type=short-term-imageless ! gvametaconvert add-tensor-data=true name=metaconvert {{POST_INFERENCE}} ! gvapython class=PostInferenceDataPublish function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=datapublisher ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink sync=true
